zh.lifeSummary: 當Ursula Southwell於大約1570年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可巴哈姆時，她的父親John Southwell37歲，母親Margaret Croftes28歲。她於1595年7月20日與Sir Thomas Richardson結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1624年6月享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭米德萊可霍爾波恩聖 安德魯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ursula Southwell于大约1570年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可巴哈姆时，她的父亲John Southwell37岁，母亲Margaret Croftes28岁。她于1595年7月20日与Sir Thomas Richardson结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1624年6月享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰米德萊可霍爾波恩聖 安德魯。

nameMeanings.name: Southwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English south ‘south’ + wel(le) ‘well, pool, spring’ (Old English sūth + wella). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived ‘by the south well’ or ‘south of the well’, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Southwell (Nottinghamshire) or Southwell on the Isle of Portland (Dorset).
in Yorkshire and Lancashire, often a hypercorrect form of Soothill, a habitational name from Soothill in Dewsbury (Yorkshire), from Old English sōt ‘soot’ + hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Ursula
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Ursula, a diminutive of ursa ‘(she-)bear’. This was the name of a 4th-century saint martyred at Cologne with a number of companions, traditionally said to have been eleven thousand, but more probably just eleven, the exaggeration being due to a misreading of a diacritic mark in an early manuscript. This name was moderately popular in the 16th century, but its use in the English-speaking world today is selective. A more recent influence has been the film actress Ursula Andress ( b. 1936 in Switzerland).

en.lifeSummary: When Ursula Southwell was born about 1570, in Barham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Southwell, was 37 and her mother, Margaret Croftes, was 28. She married Sir Thomas Richardson on 20 July 1595. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 8 daughters. She died in June 1624, at the age of 55, and was buried in Saint Andrew, Holborn, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ursula Southwell est née environ 1570, à Barham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Southwell, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Margaret Croftes, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Richardson le 20 juillet 1595. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en juin 1624, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint Andrew, Holborn, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ursula Southwell um 1570 in Barham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Southwell 37 und ihre Mutter Margaret Croftes 28. Sie hat am 20. Juli 1595 Sir Thomas Richardson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb im Juni 1624 im Alter von 55 Jahren und wurde in Saint Andrew, Holborn, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ursula Southwell è nata il circa 1570 nel Barham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Southwell, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Margaret Croftes, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Richardson il 20 luglio 1595. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel giugno 1624, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint Andrew, Holborn, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Ursula Southwell(이)가 대략 1570년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 바람에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Southwell(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Croftes(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1595년 7월 20일 Sir Thomas Richardson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1624년 6월 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 홀본 세인트 앤드루에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ursula Southwell nasceu aproximadamente 1570, em Barham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Southwell, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Croftes, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Richardson em 20 de julho de 1595. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em junho de 1624, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint Andrew, Holborn, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ursula Southwell родилась около 1570 г. в местности барам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Southwell было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Croftes, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Richardson 20 июля 1595 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла июнь 1624 г. в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт андрю, холборн, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió en junio de 1624, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Saint Andrew, Holborn, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
